feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Major Upgrades
entry.content: for Rise with S/4HANA cloud , PCE , Are there any major upgrades due within next 10 years? (If so when are these expected?)

entry.title: S/4HANA Upgrades
entry.content: for Rise with S/4HANA cloud , PCE , Will the upgrade of S/4HANA  affect adversely the current version? (Provide information as to what extent it will affect

entry.title: Free Services on Rise
entry.content: for Rise with S/4HANA cloud , PCE , What are the services provided free of cost to the purchaser as part of Annual Charges

entry.title: SAP CONNECTION PACKAGE CLOUD
entry.content:
Is there a VPN included in the base package and for DR if selected?

There is nothing in the service guide that states that a VPN is included that I can find.

It only shows up on the SAP Connection Package.

Thanks.

entry.title: Add Custom Field to Fiori Application
entry.content:
General Information

App name: Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document

App ID: F0843

System: SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud and On-Premise)

Version: 2021 FPS02

The app is based on the OData service MMIM_GR4PO_DL.

 

Description of issue

I want to add a field where the Supplier Material is displayed within the Items section, as the arrow in the image indicates. It is from the entity set “GR4PO_DL_Item”, marked in one of the screenshot from SEGW  and it is not from the CDS view.

What I have tried

  1. I started by looking into the issue with Adapt UI to try to add the field that way. However, this did not work because the field does not exist.
  2. I tried using Custom Fields. There, we used the business contexts PO Item and Material Document Item. That did not work either.

Is there any way we could introduce the new field “Supplier Material” in the items section of the above app?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA PCE: CAS package, price and included services
entry.content:
Dear All,

I was having a look at ROLES AND RESPONSIBILITIES ("R&R") matrix for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition and SAP ERP, PCE v.7-2024v2

Regarding "Implement SAP Security Notes - SAP Basis / ABAP related", it is a Standard Service, and it says 

  • "Implement SAP Security Notes for SAP Basis without manual activities. This task is
    automatically delivered if Customer has relevant CAS Package(s). Customers without relevant
    CAS Package(s) can check security notes on SAP for Me (formerly known as the ONE Support
    Launchpad) and create a Service Request"

So now my question is :
How can I know whether a customer has relevant CAS package?
And how do I know its cost and included services?

Thanks so much in advance,

Eva

entry.title: TM Shipment costs as delivery costs during goods receipt
entry.content:
Hello,

SAP note 427944 (Info: Shipment costs as delivery costs during goods receipt) describes the process on during a goods receipt for an inbound delivery, the system should take delivery costs from corresponding shipment cost documents into account.

This applies to shipment handling in LE-TRA.

I'm looking for information on whether this is possible when using integrated SAP TM instead of LE-TRA in S/4HANA 2023, however, didn't find any SAP notes or help pages on this matter.

Many thanks & kind regards

Wolfgang

entry.title: Clarifications Regarding SAP Disclosure Management Migration to SAP IaaS under RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have a customer planning to migrate to RISE with SAP who is currently running the SAP Disclosure Management solution on-premise. As part of our architecture design, we are considering moving this solution to an SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud). However, we have a few questions that require your clarification:

1.Storage Availability

Based on the SAP Description Guide, we understand that memory is available in configurations of 32 GiB, 64 GiB, and 128 GiB. Could you please clarify the storage capacity options available for SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud) so we can ensure alignment with the customer’s requirements?

2.Migration Responsibilities and Procedures

If the SAP Disclosure Management solution is moved from on-premise to the SAP IaaS Server (Windows Cloud):

•Are there any specific protocols or procedures to follow during the migration?

•Is the Partner fully responsible for operational services, including application installation and database management on the IaaS Server?

•Does the Partner have full administrative rights on this server?

 

Your guidance on the above points will greatly assist us in providing a seamless transition for our customer to the RISE with SAP environment.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition RISE with SAP 

Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your response.

entry.title: Transport from onpremise sap systems to RISE with SAP
entry.content:
Hi experts, In a green field scenario, if we want to bring in customizations and add-on programs from on-premise to RISE with SAP, what would be the best way to do it?

1. can we do client export on-premise and import to S/4HANA cloud,private edition?
2. Can we get the transfer request on-premise and import it into S/4HANA cloud,private edition?
3. If there is a version difference between on-premise (2021) and S/4HANA cloud,private edition (2023), is it acceptable to import the transfer in unconditional mode?

entry.title: Differences between S/4HANA Cloud PrivateEdition and Public Edition
entry.content:
Differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and Public Edition

What is the most effective way to check the differences between S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

▪Things to check
・Differences in available modules
・Scope
・Limitations
・How to extend

Best regards,
YO-YO

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to create the Credit Management (SAP S/4HANA CLOUD 2408)
entry.content:
How to create the Advance Credit Management for S4hana Public Cloud

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: QM/PM_Master Inspection Characteristics assignment in General maintenance Task List_mass upload
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

Could you please advise how to assign Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) to General Maintenance Task List via mass upload. 

We had used Migration cockpit template General Maintenance Task List to upload Task List, however using this template we could not upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) as this field is not available. 

Now, our requirement is to mass upload Master Inspection Characteristics (MIC) assigned to Task List Group in IA06 Transaction.  

Could you please advise whether any option is available for this in SAP Standard or any SAP upload tools should be used for this.

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Temporary servers for upgrade projects in S/4HANA Cloud private edition
entry.content:
Hi, all

We are approaching the time when we need to upgrade older version of S/4HANA, and we are considering the best approach.

We understand the scope of services provided by ECS and CAS, but we would like to know about the costs and procedures related to the temporary servers(sandbox system) needed during the upgrade project.

  1. If we subscribe to CAS and proceed with the project, does the CAS package include the provision of temporary servers?
  2. If we proceed with the project by requesting ECS services only, how do we request temporary servers? Additionally, will there be separate charges for the temporary server usage?

Best Regards,

entry.title: RISE Base Option VPN amount
entry.content:
Hi SAP team

 

Colud you please clarify how many S2S VPNs does the customer right under RISE private cloud base option?

As per my intepretation of R&R document, customer can deploy 5 S2S VPN, however I will appreciate your clarification

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: When uploading bank statements, error: Currency USD not permitted in account / 1234567890
entry.content:
Let's assume the following situation: You upload a bank statement file into your system. It contains two statements (or more).

Statement one is for bank account 0987654321 which has the currency configured in EUR in the Manage Bank Accounts master data app.

Statement two is for bank account 1234567890 which has the currency USD. 

Now suddenly you see the error message in the log and the upload fails.

entry.title: Rise(private edition) have HANA HA(system replication) by default?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Rise(Private edition) have HANA HA(system replication) by default? or SAP just talk about SLA? 

Because when we login to customer Rise production system, we cannot check any HANA HA(system replication) setting & status 

thanks 

John

entry.title: Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited (The recipients are determined automatically.)
entry.content:
Flexible workflow: Recipients cannot be edited.

Previously I could edit the recipients of a workflow, but now I get the message “The recipients are determined automatically.”, and it does not allow to edit the recipients.
What can I do to make the recipients editable?

entry.title: Target field exposure for Substitution rule in F4406 for journal entries
entry.content:
I am interested to know what the recommended approach is for Managing and creating substitution rules in SAP S/4HANA Private cloud. 

There is access to ggb1, but this only exposes tables and fields on the old tables and not ACDOCA.

There is also the possibility to create new rules under the fiori app F4406 Manage Validations and Substitution rules, which it appears the new way and pointing to ACODCA. 

The target fields under F4406 seem to be limited and I can't find the relevant configuration to extend these for other existing standard fields such as G/L Account.

Any guidance on this will be appreciated.

Please note that I have been referring to documentation in here https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/651d8af3ea974ad1a4d74449122c620e/1ec5d4ccf09646c7b720ac55adb5ef4a.html?locale=en-US&q=manage+validation/substitution+rules+for+journal+entries but have not found relevancy information on my question above.

entry.title: On-prem SAP S/4hana to RISE with SAP S/4HANA cloud private DNS options
entry.content:
Hi,

During Migration it is mandatory to have DNS available at On-Premise. 

If the Customer end is not having any DNS installed then what are the available options for fulfill the DNS requirement.

Regards

Niten

entry.title: Object SFPF(Adobe Form) is not allowed in ABAP Cloud Development. What's the alternate of it?
entry.content:
I encounter a message while trying run ATC check with 'ABAP_CLOUD_READINESS' that neither Adobe Form nor Smartforms are allowed in ABAP Cloud Development.

I would like to know what's the alternate of forms in ABAP Clean Core approach.
